cards.name: 8 of Wands
cards.interpretation: movement, speed, progress, quick decisions, sudden changes, excitement

cards.name: 2 of Wands, reversed
cards.interpretation: bad planning, overanalyzing, not taking action, playing it safe, avoiding risk

cards.name: 6 of Pentacles, reversed
cards.interpretation: power dynamics, abuse of generosity, strings attached gifts, inequality, extortion
